allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: add project metadata, license, and tighten config *)

Bash(bun --env-file=../../.env -e "const e = process.env; console.log\('SUPER_PUBLIC_SITE_URL:', e.SUPER_PUBLIC_SITE_URL\); console.log\('API_PORT:', e.API_PORT\); console.log\('DATABASE_URL:', e.DATABASE_URL ? 'SET' : 'MISSING'\);")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(api\): add --env-file flag to load .env from monorepo root *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: set favicon to super logo CDN URL *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(assets\): add ui-react component library with Select and Modal *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(workspace\): redesign workspace page with Tailwind CSS, add home button to assets *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(canvas\): add Canvas API with CRUD, versioning, and tests *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(workspace\): connect recent-content panels to live API data *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(canvas\): scaffold Canvas frontend application *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(transfers\): persist transfer rooms to database with expiry cleanup *)
